cinematic_dark.prompt_suffix: shot on Arri Alexa 65, anamorphic lens flare, teal and orange color grading, cinematic lighting, film grain
cinematic_dark.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, overexposed, cartoon, anime

cinematic_warm.prompt_suffix: shot on RED V-Raptor, warm golden hour lighting, soft diffusion, 35mm film look, Kodak Vision3 500T
cinematic_warm.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, cold colors, harsh lighting

neon_noir.prompt_suffix: neon-lit environment, cyberpunk aesthetic, heavy rain, reflections on wet surfaces, neon signs, moody atmosphere

documentary.prompt_suffix: documentary style, natural lighting, handheld camera, 16mm film grain, realistic, candid moment

anime.prompt_suffix: anime style, Studio Ghibli inspired, vibrant colors, detailed background, cel shading, beautiful scenery

vintage_film.prompt_suffix: vintage Super 8 film look, heavy grain, light leaks, desaturated colors, 1970s aesthetic, nostalgic
vintage_film.negative_prompt: modern, clean, digital, sharp, high contrast

commercial.prompt_suffix: high-end commercial look, perfect lighting, clean composition, product photography quality, 8K resolution

music_video.prompt_suffix: music video aesthetic, dynamic lighting, color gel effects, smoke machine, high contrast, dramatic
